title: Pigeon Control & Deterrents in Dyker Heights, Brooklyn | $550-$5,000
metaDescription: Professional pigeon control and deterrent services in Dyker Heights, Brooklyn. Protect your property from pigeon damage with humane, effective solutions. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Dyker Heights residents know that pigeons can be more than just a nuisance—they can damage property, create unsanitary conditions, and nest in the eaves of homes and commercial buildings. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive pigeon control and deterrent services tailored to the unique architecture and needs of Dyker Heights properties. Our humane, effective solutions range from $550 to $5,000 depending on the scope of your infestation.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Dyker Heights and surrounding Brooklyn neighborhoods with customized pigeon control strategies. We use proven, humane deterrent methods including netting, spikes, and exclusion techniques that protect your property long-term without harming birds.
localContext: From the grand single-family homes along 11th and 12th Avenues to the classic brick apartment buildings near 86th Street, Dyker Heights properties are particularly vulnerable to pigeon roosting due to their architectural details and proximity to shopping districts. Our team understands the local building styles and provides discreet installations that preserve the beauty of your Dyker Heights property while keeping pigeons away.

faqs.question: Why are pigeons such a problem in Dyker Heights?
faqs.answer: Dyker Heights features many older homes with ledges, eaves, and architectural details that provide ideal nesting spots for pigeons. The neighborhood's proximity to commercial areas along 13th Avenue and 86th Street also attracts pigeons looking for food sources. Their droppings can damage property, corrode building materials, and create health hazards.

faqs.question: What pigeon deterrent methods do you use in Dyker Heights?
faqs.answer: We offer a range of humane deterrent solutions including bird netting, anti-roosting spikes, wire systems, visual deterrents, and exclusion work to seal entry points. Our technicians assess your specific property and customize a solution that works best for your building type and the severity of your pigeon problem.

faqs.question: How much does pigeon control cost in Dyker Heights?
faqs.answer: Pigeon control services in Dyker Heights range from $550 for basic deterrent installations on smaller properties to $5,000 for comprehensive solutions on larger homes or multi-unit buildings. The final cost depends on the size of the affected area, the severity of the infestation, and the type of deterrent systems required.

faqs.question: How long does it take to solve a pigeon problem?
faqs.answer: Most pigeon deterrent installations can be completed in one to three days, depending on the size of your property and complexity of the installation. Once deterrents are in place, pigeons typically abandon the area within days to weeks. We also offer follow-up inspections to ensure the solution remains effective and make any necessary adjustments.
